item.title: wmayner/pyphi
item.description: A toolbox for integrated information theory.

item.title: NeurodataWithoutBorders/pynwb
item.description: A Python API for working with Neurodata stored in the NWB Format

item.title: canlab/CanlabCore
item.description: Core tools required for running Canlab Matlab toolboxes. The heart of this toolbox is object-oriented tools that enable interactive analysis of neuroimaging data and simple scripts using high-level commands tailored to neuroimaging analysis

item.title: DeepLearnPhysics/spine
item.description: Scalable Particle Imaging with Neural Embeddings

item.title: WildCraftsmanFilter/AI-Voice-Changer-Real-Time-Desktop
item.description: ⭐️ AI Voice-Changer Real-Time 2026 is advanced AI voice changer software powered by deep learning and neural networks for real-time voice transformation. Perfect for streaming, gaming, Discord, Zoom, and content creation, it offers low late

item.title: ELM-Research/ECG-Neural-Networks
item.description: Pretraining and evaluation pipelines for ECG-specific neural networks (e.g., ECG encoders, ECG generative models)

item.title: patr1ckzhu/ECTNet
item.description: End-to-end motor imagery BCI: custom ADS1299+STM32 acquisition board → PsychoPy+LSL recording → PyTorch training (transfer learning from BCI IV-2b) → real-time CPU inference (~40ms)

item.title: zerong7777-boop/awesome-fmri-encoding-decoding
item.description: Curated papers, datasets, and tools for fMRI-based encoding models, decoding, and representational analyses (language, vision, video, audio, and mental state).

item.title: Eelbrain/Eelbrain
item.description: Hardware & Acquisition

item.title: jonescompneurolab/hnn-core
item.description: Simulation and optimization of neural circuits for MEG/EEG source estimates

item.title: spdlearn/spd_learn
item.description: SPDlearn: A Geometric Deep Learning Python Library for Neural Decoding Through Trivialization

item.title: bartulem/usv-playpen
item.description: GUI/CLI to control experiments w/ multichannel audio, neural and video recordings, conduct data processing, analyses and make visualizations.

item.title: AxonOS-org/axonos-kernel
item.description: Hard real-time Rust microkernel for brain-computer interfaces. #![no_std] on Cortex-M, EDF scheduling with Kani-verified WCRT bounds, zero-copy intent path, capability-based privacy by construction. ABI v1 — tandem with axonos-sdk.

item.title: monyuonyu/p-kernel
item.description: AI-first microkernel (T-Kernel 2.0, x86): on-device TCC compilation, Linux ABI ring-3, Raft consensus, self-evolving AI loop. The OS that survives until the last node.

item.title: ford442/brain_viz
item.description: Real-time 3D brain data visualization powered by EEG/tensors and WebGPU.

item.title: tensorflow/tensorflow
item.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

item.title: BasedHardware/omi
item.description: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

item.title: mne-tools/mne-python
item.description: MNE: Magnetoencephalography (MEG) and Electroencephalography (EEG) in Python

item.title: braindecode/braindecode
item.description: Deep learning software to decode EEG, ECG or MEG signals

item.title: NeuroTechX/moabb
item.description: Mother of All BCI Benchmarks

item.title: fieldtrip/fieldtrip
item.description: The MATLAB toolbox for MEG, EEG and iEEG analysis

item.title: SpikeInterface/spikeinterface
item.description: A Python-based module for creating flexible and robust spike sorting pipelines.

item.title: brainstorm-tools/brainstorm3
item.description: Brainstorm software: MEG, EEG, fNIRS, ECoG, sEEG and electrophysiology

item.title: spm/spm
item.description: SPM (Statistical Parametric Mapping) - Development Version

item.title: Chaste/Chaste
item.description: Chaste - Cancer Heart And Soft Tissue Environment - main public repository.
